query:
SELECT 
  ma.id, ma.scheduledDate, ma.title, ma.status, ma.consultorId
FROM mentor_appointments ma
WHERE ma.consultorId = 28
AND ma.scheduledDate = '2026-03-23'
AND ma.status != 'cancelado';
